author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint V.3 — DenseNet-121 forward parity. Same approach as ViT: (1) BEFORE probe; (2) add conformance entries for densenet121 output-shape, finite-values, param-count, custom-classes, determinism to conformance_vision_models.rs; (3) extend regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py with DenseNet-121 entries; (4) AFTER probe; (5) workspace build+clippy; (6) close. Reference: torchvision.models.densenet121(weights=None). DenseNet-121 block config [6,12,24,16] growth_rate=32 was deferred from sprint B.5.a. No logit-match required against pretrained weights — only shape+finite+determinism per sprint V.3 scope.
